---
name: flutter-testing
description: Enforce testing best practices in Flutter features, including unit tests, bloc tests, and repository mock tests.
metadata:
  model: models/gemini-3.1-pro-preview
  last_modified: Sat, 2 May 2026 19:45:59 GMT
---
## Inject Rules

* Generate:

  * unit test (UseCase)
  * bloc test
  * repository mock test

* Use:

  * mocktail / mockito

* Cover:

  * success case
  * failure case
  * edge case

* Avoid:

  * testing UI rendering unless asked
